title: Now Hiring Software Engineer at ABB India International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Software Engineer at ABB India International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
ABB India International Enterprises, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Mumbai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About ABB India International Enterprises:
ABB India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ABB India International Enterprises!
